title: OpeningInstance
description: Runtime opening instance. parameters holds sparse overrides only; resolve against the type ParametricSchema before generation.

parameters.description: Sparse overrides only. Keys must exist on the opening type ParametricSchema. Values equal to schema defaults must be omitted.

state.description: Runtime kinematic state separate from parametric schema. Applied at generation when open_angle is not explicitly overridden.

openRatio.description: 0 = closed, 1 = fully open. InstanceParameters.forGeneration scales schema open_angle max by this ratio when open_angle is absent from parameters.
